title: clinopodium chinense subsp. grandiflorum
intro: Clinopodium chinense subsp. grandiflorum, also known as Chinese Clinopodium or Chinese Sweet Woodruff, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to calm the nervous system and reduce anxiety. The health benefits of Clinopodium chinense subsp. grandiflorum include improving sleep quality, reducing stress and anxiety, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in cooking and as a natural sweetener.
